LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NIZARD AWADALLA DBA NIZARIO'S PIZZA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SATISFIED ITS SUMMARY JUDGMENT BURDEN AND PLAINTIFF DID NOT PRESENT ANY FACTS SHOWING THAT DEFENDANT OWED PLAINTIFF A DUTY TO PROTECT HIM AGAINST THIRD PARTY CRIMINAL CONDUCT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-13-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GO, CHARLES

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2012 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Heidi Adams, Esq., from Lewis Brisbois, Bisgaard & Smith LLP, 415-262-8507, for Defendant and moving party
Roseann Torres, Esq., from Torres Law Group, 510-835-2484, for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT NIZARD AWADALLA DBA NIZARIO'S PIZZA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Granted. Defendant satisfied its summary judgment burden and plaintiff did not present any facts showing that Defendant owed Plaintiff a duty to protect him against third party criminal conduct. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2012 Set For Trial On Sep-10-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
